languages.text: "Что?" {n}В голосе Калькасара слышится нотка изумления.{/n} "Нет. Нет, чудовище, заточенное в Ярме — ключ к будущему Человечества. Его место — в руках людей, а не ксеноса!"

traits.locale_text: "Что?" {n}В голосе Калькасара слышится нотка изумления.{/n} "Нет. Нет, чудовище, заточенное в Ярме — ключ к будущему Человечества. Его место — в руках людей, а не ксеноса!"

languages.text: "What?" {n}You hear a note of amazement in Calcazar's voice.{/n} "No. No, the monster imprisoned in Yoke is the key to Humanity's future. Its place is in the hands of humans, not a xenos!"
languages.original_text: "Что?" {n}В голосе Калькасара слышится нотка изумления.{/n} "Нет. Нет, чудовище, заточенное в Ярме — ключ к будущему Человечества. Его место — в руках людей, а не ксеноса!"

traits.locale_text: "What?" {n}You hear a note of amazement in Calcazar's voice.{/n} "No. No, the monster imprisoned in Yoke is the key to Humanity's future. Its place is in the hands of humans, not a xenos!"
"What?" {n}You hear a note of amazement in Calcazar's voice.{/n} "No. No, the monster imprisoned in Yoke is the key to Humanity's future. Its place is in the hands of humans, not a xenos!"
"What?" {n}You hear a note of amazement in Calcazar's voice.{/n} "No. No, the monster imprisoned in Yoke is the key to Humanity's future. Its place is in the hands of humans, not a xenos!"

languages.text: “什么？”{n}你听到卡尔卡扎的声音里带着一丝惊愕。{/n}“不。不行，那囚禁在圣枷里的怪物是人类未来的关键。它应该掌握在人类手中，绝不能交给异形！”
languages.original_text: "What?" {n}You hear a note of amazement in Calcazar's voice.{/n} "No. No, the monster imprisoned in Yoke is the key to Humanity's future. Its place is in the hands of humans, not a xenos!"

traits.locale_text: “什么？”{n}你听到卡尔卡扎的声音里带着一丝惊愕。{/n}“不。不行，那囚禁在圣枷里的怪物是人类未来的关键。它应该掌握在人类手中，绝不能交给异形！”

languages.text: «¿Cómo?». {n}Oyes un toque de asombro en la voz de Calcazar.{/n} «No. No, el monstruo encerrado en el Yugo es la clave del futuro de la Humanidad. Debe estar en las manos de un ser humano, ¡no de un xenos!».
languages.original_text: "What?" {n}You hear a note of amazement in Calcazar's voice.{/n} "No. No, the monster imprisoned in Yoke is the key to Humanity's future. Its place is in the hands of humans, not a xenos!"

traits.locale_text: «¿Cómo?». {n}Oyes un toque de asombro en la voz de Calcazar.{/n} «No. No, el monstruo encerrado en el Yugo es la clave del futuro de la Humanidad. Debe estar en las manos de un ser humano, ¡no de un xenos!».

languages.text: « Quoi ? » {n}Vous remarquez une légère surprise dans la voix de Calcazar.{/n} « Non. Non, le monstre emprisonné par le Joug est la clé de l'avenir de l'humanité. Sa place est entre les mains des humains, et non entre les griffes d'un xénos ! »
languages.original_text: "What?" {n}You hear a note of amazement in Calcazar's voice.{/n} "No. No, the monster imprisoned in Yoke is the key to Humanity's future. Its place is in the hands of humans, not a xenos!"

traits.locale_text: « Quoi ? » {n}Vous remarquez une légère surprise dans la voix de Calcazar.{/n} « Non. Non, le monstre emprisonné par le Joug est la clé de l'avenir de l'humanité. Sa place est entre les mains des humains, et non entre les griffes d'un xénos ! »

languages.text: "Was?" {n}Du hörst einen Hauch Verwunderung in Calcazars Stimme.{/n} "Nein. Nein, das im Joch gefangene Monster ist der Schlüssel für die Zukunft der Menschheit. Sein Platz ist in den Händen von Menschen, nicht in denen eines Xenos."
languages.original_text: "What?" {n}You hear a note of amazement in Calcazar's voice.{/n} "No. No, the monster imprisoned in Yoke is the key to Humanity's future. Its place is in the hands of humans, not a xenos!"

traits.locale_text: "Was?" {n}Du hörst einen Hauch Verwunderung in Calcazars Stimme.{/n} "Nein. Nein, das im Joch gefangene Monster ist der Schlüssel für die Zukunft der Menschheit. Sein Platz ist in den Händen von Menschen, nicht in denen eines Xenos."

languages.text: "Ne?" {n}Calcazar'ın sesinde şaşkınlık dolu bir tını duyuyorsun.{/n} "Hayır. Hayır, Boyunduruk'a hapsedilen canavar, İnsanlığın geleceğinin anahtarıdır. Onun yeri bir zenonun değil, insanların elleridir!"
languages.original_text: "What?" {n}You hear a note of amazement in Calcazar's voice.{/n} "No. No, the monster imprisoned in Yoke is the key to Humanity's future. Its place is in the hands of humans, not a xenos!"

traits.locale_text: "Ne?" {n}Calcazar'ın sesinde şaşkınlık dolu bir tını duyuyorsun.{/n} "Hayır. Hayır, Boyunduruk'a hapsedilen canavar, İnsanlığın geleceğinin anahtarıdır. Onun yeri bir zenonun değil, insanların elleridir!"

languages.text: 「何？」{n}カルカザールの声には驚きのニュアンスが。{/n} 「いいえ。いいえ、ヨークに囚われた怪物こそ人類の未来の鍵。その場所は人間の手にあるべき、異種族の手ではない！」
languages.original_text: "What?" {n}You hear a note of amazement in Calcazar's voice.{/n} "No. No, the monster imprisoned in Yoke is the key to Humanity's future. Its place is in the hands of humans, not a xenos!"

traits.locale_text: 「何？」{n}カルカザールの声には驚きのニュアンスが。{/n} 「いいえ。いいえ、ヨークに囚われた怪物こそ人類の未来の鍵。その場所は人間の手にあるべき、異種族の手ではない！」
